ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the clothing item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the clothing item */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the item is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the price (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the clothing item */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item is currently available for sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "standard_size" TEXT /* Standard size label (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* Size according to US standards */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Size according to UK standards */,
  "de_size" TEXT /* Size according to German (DE) standards */,
  "fr_size" TEXT /* Size according to French (FR) standards */,
  "it_size" TEXT /* Size according to Italian (IT) standards */,
  "jp_size" TEXT /* Size according to Japanese (JP) standards */,
  "es_size" TEXT /* Size according to Spanish (ES) standards */,
  "au_size" TEXT /* Size according to Australian (AU) standards */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the item-size mapping */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size is applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item-size mapping is currently active */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this size is the default for the item in the specified region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "measurement_profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's measurement profile */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_measurement_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_profile_id") REFERENCES measurement_profiles ("measurement_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_profiles" (
  "measurement_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement profile */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "height" REAL /* Height in inches */,
  "preferred_fit" TEXT /* Preferred fit (e.g., Regular, Slim, Loose) */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "neck_size" REAL /* Neck size measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the measurement profile is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was provided */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the recommendation is made */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer accepted the recommendation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the recommendation is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who returned the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region from which the return was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the return issue has been resolved */,
  "resolution_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the resolution of the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the item's size and fit */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region from which the feedback was provided */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback issue has been resolved */,
  "resolution_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the resolution of the feedback */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)
